applets.name: Projeto Quimera GUI
applets.description: A dashboard for visualizing and managing social prospecting profiles. It provides detailed profile analysis, including personality traits, interests, and engagement scores, along with tools for interaction.

applets.name: Audio Orb
applets.description: Speak, and the orb responds. An interactive experience powered by the Live Audio API.

applets.name: Architectural & Ethical AI Analysis
applets.description: An interactive web application that presents a deep-dive analysis of the architecture, ethics, and implementation of a conceptual automated social engagement AI system.

applets.name: Quimera Dashboard
applets.description: A dashboard for configuring, monitoring metrics, and managing the handoff process for the Quimera automated social prospecting system.

applets.name: AI Image Text Extractor
applets.description: An elegant web application that leverages Google's Gemini AI to extract text from uploaded images. It provides a side-by-side view of your image and the high-fidelity text output, preserving original formatting.

applets.name: Ethical AI Communication Assistant
applets.description: An AI-powered assistant designed to help users improve their online profiles and craft authentic, respectful conversation starters, promoting genuine connections based on shared interests.

applets.name: MediaSim
applets.description: Create and simulate generative media with the latest Veo 3 Fast and GenMedia models using tldraw canvas to explore different workfflows

applets.name: MediaSim
applets.description: Create and simulate generative media with the latest Veo 3 Fast and GenMedia models using tldraw canvas to explore different workfflows

applets.name: Video to Learning App
applets.description: Instantly turn YouTube videos into fun learning apps using AI. Explore concepts visually and learn actively!

applets.name: Thinking Space
applets.description: Search a custom set of images using natural language.

applets.name: PromptDJ MIDI
applets.description: Control real time music with a MIDI controller.

applets.name: Dictation App
applets.description: Effortless dictation powered by Gemini. Turn long rambling recordings into perfectly transcribed notes.
